message:
✨ Convert REST-only hooks to SSE streaming + parallel fetching (#925)

Phase 1: Parallelize LLMd hooks (biggest perf impact)
- Extract fetchLLMdServersForCluster() and run clusters in parallel
- Parallelize HPA/VA/VPA autoscaler queries within each cluster
- Add progressiveFetcher to useCachedLLMdServers and useCachedLLMdModels
- Convert sequential fetchLLMdModels to parallel Promise.allSettled
- Bump kubectlProxy maxConcurrentRequests from 2 to 4

Phase 2: Add backend SSE endpoints + frontend cached hooks
- Add GetNodesStream, GetGPUNodesStream, GetWarningEventsStream handlers
- Register 3 new /stream routes in server.go
- Add useCachedNodes hook with SSE progressive fetching
- Add useCachedWarningEvents hook with SSE progressive fetching
- Add nodes/warningEvents to coreFetchers for prefetch

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
